emails.subject: PNL
emails.body: PNL The PnL Mike put together for the 5/02/02 didnt match my sheet.

emails.subject: RE: PNL
emails.body: RE: PNL There were 3 Jun-02 buys that Jeff put in bridgetrade for your strategy code that went into Jeff's book by mistake...The deals are worth $40,000...They will be moved to your book and a new pl issued once ERMS is running again To: Knoblauh, Jay; Green, Michael

emails.subject: RE: PNL
emails.body: You the man. That should agree with my spreedsheet. To: Parks, Joe

emails.subject: PNL
emails.body: PNL The major difference seems to be in gas daily, about $16k. Will you look at it please.

emails.subject: RE: PNL
emails.body: RE: PNL Joe, Last night was the first night that any of your gas daily (you began a position on the 14th or 15th) pl pulled through. It was an error on our side. So the value that came through last night is a net value of all your gas daily trades to date. Jay To: Knoblauh, Jay
